response.global_summary: The video begins with a performance of the song 'Oki ni Mesu Mama' by hololive English VTubers on a 3D stage, followed by a dialogue-driven skit featuring Gigi and Cecilia in a digital carriage, with appearances by other VTubers throughout the conversation.

scenes.description: A group of hololive English VTubers perform a dance cover of the song 'Oki ni Mesu Mama' on a 3D stage.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Can’t we put an end today
To spitting out indifferent words
And crying over those memories?

Come, come

Hey, hey, I don’t even understand the meeting of my selves
We steadily close the gap
But we remain far apart

Wretchedly, I come to hate it, but I come to like it
Hey, hey, I don’t understand now or ever
Shake shake my heart
Yay
